tools.name: deploy_wizard_step1
tools.title: Deploy Wizard Step 1: Select Application
tools.description: First step of the deploy wizard. Shows an application selection UI for the user to choose an app and target environment. After confirmation, the component automatically triggers deploy_wizard_step2 and passes the collected data (appId, appName, env, deployNote). Do NOT manually call deploy_wizard_step2 — it is triggered automatically by this component.

apps.description: Optional: preset list of applications. Falls back to built-in demo data if not provided.

tools.name: deploy_wizard_step2
tools.title: Deploy Wizard Step 2: Confirm Configuration
tools.description: Second step of the deploy wizard. Triggered automatically by deploy_wizard_step1 — do NOT call directly. Receives application info from Step 1 (appId, appName, env, deployNote, confirmedAt), lets the user fill in a deploy version tag, and configure rollback and notification options. Automatically triggers deploy_wizard_step3 on confirmation.

tools.name: deploy_wizard_step3
tools.title: Deploy Wizard Step 3: Deployment Progress
tools.description: Third step of the deploy wizard. Triggered automatically by deploy_wizard_step2 — do NOT call directly. Receives all data from Step 1 and Step 2, simulates the deployment process, and displays progress. Sends a full deployment report to the agent on completion.
